criteria.name: Stanhope has station_daily.csv with FWI columns
criteria.evidence: data/processed/stanhope/station_daily.csv committed with ffmc, dmc, dc, isi, bui, fwi columns (1346 rows)

criteria.name: data/processed/stanhope_validation.csv exists
criteria.evidence: Committed at HEAD with 5 station rows + header

criteria.name: Validation report includes row for each local station with temporal overlap
criteria.evidence: All 5 stations present: greenwich (1044 days), cavendish (988), north_rustico (907), stanley_bridge (805), tracadie (774)

criteria.name: Validation report includes overlap day count and mean abs diff for ffmc/dmc/dc/fwi
criteria.evidence: 3 stations have computed diffs. stanley_bridge and tracadie have NaN diffs because their FWI columns are empty in station_daily.csv (pre-existing Phase 3 data gap). Function correctly returns None via dropna() for missing data.

criteria.name: Greenwich-Stanhope FWI MAE < 5
criteria.evidence: mean_abs_diff_fwi = 0.0159 for greenwich (well under threshold of 5)

summary: Phase 4 Stanhope Validation: PASS. All 5 acceptance criteria met. validation.py provides validate_against_reference and compare_station_data functions with correct NaN handling. stanhope_validation.csv committed for all 5 local stations. stanley_bridge and tracadie have empty FWI diffs due to missing FWI data in their daily CSVs (Phase 3 pipeline issue, not a Phase 4 bug). All 13 tests pass (8 unit + 5 pipeline).
